'''鈭歠-j-l-n''' ('''kafajlenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:photocapture|photocapture]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-j-l-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:photocapture|photocapture]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-j-l-n
|-
! Lemma
| kafajlenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifajlenoko|thifajlenoko]] || [[word:jifajlenoko|jifajlenoko]] || [[word:shifajlenoko|shifajlenoko]] || [[word:kifajlenoko|kifajlenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fajlenoko|th忙fajlenoko]] || [[word:j忙fajlenoko|j忙fajlenoko]] || [[word:sh忙fajlenoko|sh忙fajlenoko]] || [[word:k忙fajlenoko|k忙fajlenoko]]
|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
